category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a parser generator for Go; pkg.go.dev documentation describes goyacc as generating Go parsers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is goyacc; pkg.go.dev module page title is goyacc.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Go package documentation page; pkg.go.dev lists README, documentation, and repository metadata for modernc.org/goyacc.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://gitlab.com/cznic/goyacc, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Go parser generator; source_facts.executables lists goyacc; pkg.go.dev usage documents yacc-style command options.
